content: Ford Motor Company is a real consumer-discretionary (automotive) issuer; the provider ratings shown here are illustrative. It is positioned exactly on the investment-grade / high-yield boundary — the classic fallen-angel case. One anchor provider places it at the lowest investment-grade notch (BBB-) while the other places it one notch lower, in high yield (BB+). The gap is a single notch, but it straddles the IG/HY line, so that one notch changes the issuer's eligibility bucket. Ford is the anchor case for the fallen-angel boundary, where notch precision matters most.
disclaimer: Real issuer (SEC filer); the provider ratings, factors, and dates shown are illustrative for demonstration and are not actual agency ratings.
